message:
fix(fuzz): resolve bd-2qss4.1 false-positive crash and fix regression harness MSRV

The fuzz_sse_parser crash (crash-28de6b) was a harness bug, not an SSE
parser bug: Strategy 3 split raw bytes before UTF-8 conversion, producing
different replacement chars at split boundaries. The harness was fixed in
23d036e4 but tests/fuzz_regression.rs still had the old buggy split.

- Fix tests/fuzz_regression.rs: split string at char boundary, not raw bytes
- Replace ceil_char_boundary (Rust 1.91) with is_char_boundary loop (MSRV-safe)
- Add unit test test_fuzz_regression_crash_28de6b in src/sse.rs
- Add regression .bin to fuzz/regression/fuzz_sse_parser/
- Update crash metadata status to resolved-false-positive

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,5 +7,6 @@
   "description": "SSE parser crash found during P2 validation",
   "stored_at": "2026-02-15T03:46:16Z",
   "size_bytes": 185,
-  "status": "open"
+  "status": "resolved-false-positive",
+  "resolution": "Harness bug: Strategy 3 split raw bytes before UTF-8 conversion, producing different replacement chars at split boundary. Fixed in 0687fa33."
 }
